channel.title: Traces, of me on Kaushik Bhat
channel.description: Recent content in Traces, of me on Kaushik Bhat

item.title: Agents for daily work
item.description: Thinking about building agents for doing my day to day work

item.title: Spoke about my work at a work event
item.description: I did a small talk about RAY in a work event. Audience was senior tech folks who were exploring moving to Razorpay. In all my previous talking events, I had to practice a lot and I would not be able to engage the audience quite well. This time, I was talking about something I was building day-in, day-out and I could paoint a great picture of all things that worked and that didn’t. I could anticipate all the questions that the audience had in mind and would could intrigue them.

item.title: Indira Nagar vs India
item.description:
Yesterday was Ugadi / Gudi Padwa (and many other spring festivals across India). I was enjoying lunch with a few friends and somewhere between a rant about the state of Bollywood and our different cultures, the conversation turned into a debate about what India should do vs what India really wants.

Meanwhile, a quiet escalation was unfolding at work. One of our customers (no names here) saw a massive traffic spike on their app. Escalations started coming in. Turns out, the app helps people create image creatives for WhatsApp — the kind you see in family groups wishing “Good Morning” and “Happy Diwali”.
